headline: Greenhaven Associates Liquidates $138 Million Stake in Millrose Properties, According to Recent SEC Filing
summary: Millrose Properties generates income through land option agreements with homebuilders, tying its cash flow to residential development activity. The company's performance is driven by builder demand and the pace of land transactions.

headline: Top 50 High-Quality Dividend Growth Stocks For April 2026

headline: Seaport Global Downgrades D.R. Horton to Neutral
summary: Seaport Global  analyst Kenneth Zener   downgrades D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) from Buy to Neutral.
